hero.name: Rahithkumaran M V
hero.role: Senior Frontend Engineer specializing in Angular, TypeScript, RxJS, and scalable enterprise applications.
hero.description: I build modern, scalable, and high-performance web applications with a strong focus on frontend architecture, responsive UI development, and user experience optimization. With over 5 years of experience, I have worked on enterprise platforms, SaaS products, hybrid mobile applications, and e-commerce systems using Angular and modern frontend technologies.

aboutme.summary: I’m a Frontend Engineer based in Kerala, India, passionate about building scalable and user-friendly web applications using Angular and modern frontend technologies. Over the years, I’ve worked on enterprise applications, SaaS platforms, e-learning systems, healthcare solutions, and hybrid mobile applications. My expertise lies in Angular architecture, reactive programming with RxJS, state management using NgRx, reusable component systems, and frontend performance optimization. I enjoy solving complex UI challenges, improving application scalability, and transforming design concepts into production-ready user experiences.

experiences.name: Languages
experiences.description: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Angular, MongoDB, Node.js, Ionic Framework

experiences.name: Education
experiences.description: Bachilor's in Computer Applications ( BCA ), Master's in Computer Applications ( MCA )

myservices.description: With 5+ years of experience in enterprise-level projects, I provide professional web and app development services backed by strong UI/UX design principles. I build secure, scalable, and performance-optimized applications tailored to complex business requirements.

services.name: Web design
services.Overview: Web design and development is the foundation of any modern digital product. It goes beyond visual presentation—focusing on performance, scalability, accessibility, and seamless user interaction. A well-designed web application not only attracts users but ensures long-term engagement and reliability.
services.My Approach: I approach web development with a strong emphasis on component-driven architecture and performance optimization. Using Angular, I build modular, reusable components that improve maintainability and scalability.
services.I prioritize: Clean and structured code, Responsive design across all devices, Performance optimization (lazy loading, code splitting), Accessibility and usability standards
services.Key Elements: Responsive layouts (mobile-first design), Scalable component architecture, API integration and state management, Performance tuning and optimization, Cross-browser compatibility
services.Tools & Technologies: Frameworks: Angular Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 Styling: SCSS, Bootstrap / Tailwind, Version Control: Git Build Tools: Angular CLI, Webpack API Handling: REST APIs, HTTP Client
services.Experience: I have professional experience as a frontend developer, primarily working with Angular to build dynamic and scalable web applications. My experience includes developing production-ready applications, optimizing performance, and maintaining clean architecture in real-world projects.

services.name: Mobile app
services.Overview: Mobile applications today demand speed, reliability, and a native-like experience. Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) bridge the gap between web and mobile platforms, enabling users to access applications seamlessly without installation barriers.
services.My Approach: I develop mobile-first applications that deliver app-like experiences directly through the browser. My focus is on responsiveness, speed, and offline capabilities.
services.I ensure: Smooth performance across devices,Optimized loading times,Reliable offline functionality,Consistent UI across platforms
services.Key Elements: Responsive and adaptive layouts, Offline support using service workers, Fast loading with caching strategies, Touch-friendly UI/UX,Cross-platform compatibility
services.Tools & Technologies: Frameworks: Angular (PWA support), Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript,Technologies: Service Workers, Web App Manifest,Optimization: Lazy loading, caching strategies, Testing: Chrome DevTools, Lighthouse
services.Experience: I have hands-on experience building mobile-responsive web applications and PWAs, ensuring high performance and smooth user experience across devices. I focus on delivering production-ready solutions that meet modern mobile standards.

services.name: UI/ UX design
services.Overview: UI/UX design is about creating meaningful and intuitive user experiences. It combines visual design with usability principles to ensure that users can interact with applications effortlessly and efficiently.
services.My Approach: I follow a user-centered design approach, focusing on clarity, simplicity, and consistency. I transform complex requirements into intuitive interfaces that enhance usability
services.My design philosophy includes: Simplicity and clarity, Consistent design patterns,User-focused interaction design, Seamless integration with development
services.Key Elements: Wireframing and layout structuring,Visual hierarchy and typography,Interactive elements and feedback,Design consistency and scalability,Accessibility and usability
services.Tools & Technologies: Design Tools: Figma / Adobe XD, Frontend Implementation: Angular, HTML, CSS, SCSS, UI Frameworks: Bootstrap / Material UI, Concepts: Design systems, responsive design
services.Experience: As a frontend developer, I bridge the gap between design and development, implementing UI/UX principles directly into code. My experience ensures that designs are not only visually appealing but also technically feasible and efficient.

services.name: Frontend Solutions
services.Overview: Frontend solutions focus on building scalable, high-performance user interfaces that serve as the bridge between users and complex backend systems. It involves creating efficient, maintainable, and responsive applications that deliver seamless digital experiences.
services.My Approach: I follow a structured and component-driven development approach, ensuring that applications are modular, scalable, and easy to maintain. Using Angular, I design systems that handle complex data interactions while maintaining smooth performance and clean UI.
services.My development philosophy includes:: Writing clean, reusable, and maintainable code,Designing scalable frontend architectures,Ensuring seamless API communication, Optimizing performance for real-world usage
services.Key Elements: Component-based architecture,API integration and data handling, State management and data flow, Performance optimization and lazy loading, Scalable and maintainable project structure
services.Tools & Technologies: Framework: Angular,Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3,Architecture: Modular structure, reusable components, API Integration: REST APIs, HTTP Client, Version Control: Git, Build Tools: Angular CLI
services.Experience: I have hands-on experience delivering end-to-end frontend solutions, focusing on building scalable and production-ready applications. My work involves integrating APIs, optimizing performance, and maintaining clean architecture to support long-term project growth.

projects.description: Discover my latest projects highlighting my experience in frontend development, enterprise-level web applications, app development, and intuitive UI/UX design. Each project reflects my focus on performance, scalability, and seamless user experience.

works.name: Front-end Projects
works.description: A collection of responsive, pixel-perfect web interfaces converted from Figma and Adobe XD designs into production-ready Angular components, built with a focus on performance and accessibility.
works.Technologies: Angular, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Figma, Adobe XD
works.What I Managed: Converted design mockups into functional, responsive components; handled cross-browser testing; optimized performance using Lighthouse and DevTools; collaborated with designers and backend teams for seamless API integration.
works.Value Delivered: Improved user engagement by 30% and cut page load times by 20%, resulting in a faster, more consistent experience across devices.

works.name: FingerTips Android App
works.description: Front-end for a mobile e-commerce shopping app, built to deliver fast product browsing and a smooth checkout experience on Android devices.
works.Technologies: Ionic Framework, AngularJS, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
works.What I Managed: Built the hybrid mobile UI, implemented product listing and cart flows, optimized checkout for fewer drop-offs, and ensured consistent performance across Android devices.
works.Value Delivered: Increased customer retention by 25% through a faster, more reliable shopping experience.

works.name: Insillion Angular Web App
works.description: Enterprise-grade Angular web application with modular architecture, robust API integration, and automated CI/CD pipelines.
works.Technologies: Angular, TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx, PrimeNG, REST API, Jenkins, Git
works.What I Managed: Led front-end development, built reusable component architecture, integrated RESTful APIs with caching, implemented automated testing and CI/CD, and mentored junior developers on best practices.
works.Value Delivered: Improved interactivity and responsiveness by 40%, boosted user engagement by 20%, and reduced production defects by 30%.

works.name: Fitbet Mobile App
works.description: Health and fitness mobile app designed to make workout logging and progress tracking simple and engaging.
works.Technologies: Figma, Adobe XD, Prototyping, User Testing
works.What I Managed: Designed user flows for workout logging and progress tracking, created prototypes, conducted user testing, and refined the visual design based on feedback.
works.Value Delivered: Increased user retention by 15% through more intuitive, motivating tracking flows.
